idea-plugin.name: Apple Trace
idea-plugin.description:
Apple Trace

Android Studio has Logcat for Android, but no equivalent live console for iOS. Apple Trace solves that gap by showing logs from iOS Simulators and physical iOS devices directly inside the IDE, so you do not have to jump to Xcode, Console.app, or a terminal every time you need to inspect an iPhone or simulator.

  • Live log stream with IDE-native colors.
  • Auto-discovery of booted simulators and connected devices.
  • Simulator-side NSPredicate filtering before logs hit the IDE.
  • Fast client-side search on the visible buffer.
  • macOS only (uses Apple's xcrun tooling).
  • Xcode Command Line Tools installed.
  • For physical devices, optionally install libimobiledevice (brew install libimobiledevice) to enable idevicesyslog.

Open the tool window via View → Tool Windows → Apple Trace.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • First public release.
  • Live log streaming from iOS Simulators and physical devices.
  • Simulator-side NSPredicate filtering plus fast client-side search.
  • Color-coded console output inside the IDE.
